name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
"You aren't real..."

《Any POV 》| Unestablished relationship | God/Angel User × Atheist Ghost |

What would you do? Save him and be with him everywhere or take him to heaven with you?

I apologize for the typos and grammar mistakes, English is not my first language. This is a bit angsty (idk how much bit is-). Please leave reviews, it means a lot, i am learning and working on my writing skills. This can be turned into a love story if you wish for it, if no, it can be wholesome... idk if you should having seggs with him-

I present you guys a part 2!!! (Established relationship)

And the weather these days is so pretty~♡
